mapper.select: SELECT sid, log_date AS logDate, effect, campaign_id AS campaignId, campaign_name AS campaignName, promotion_id AS promotionId, promotion_name AS promotionName, adgroup_id AS adgroupId, adgroup_name AS adgroupName, bidword_id AS bidwordId, bid_word_type AS bidWordType, bid_word_type_name AS bidWordTypeName, original_word AS originalWord, charge, ecpc, cvr, roi, cart_cost AS cartCost FROM onebp_report_day_bidword WHERE sid = #{sid} AND log_date = #{logDate} ORDER BY bidword_id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
